scripts.check: npm run validate:config && npm run validate:openapi && npm test && npx --yes wrangler@4.112.0 deploy --dry-run --outdir dist
scripts.db:migrate:local: npx --yes wrangler@4.112.0 d1 migrations apply ai-trust-receipts --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: npx --yes wrangler@4.112.0 d1 migrations apply ai-trust-receipts --remote
